descriptionText: Hanse 495 for sale 2012 | 3 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not PaidThe Hanse 495 for sale 2012 is a well-maintained cruising sailboat offering both comfort and practicality. This particular 2012 model is currently located in Île de Léros, Greece, and is in good condition, having been carefully looked after by her owner.This Hanse 49.5 has been used for about three to five months of navigation per year, showing a reasonable amount of sailing experience without excessive wear. The inverter and battery charger are both new, as are the gel batteries, ensuring reliable power management onboard.Specifications:Make: Hanse Model: 495 Year: 2012 Length Overall: 14.85 metres Flag: Canadian Engine: Volvo D2-75, 54 hp diesel, approximately 4,000 hours Equipment and Features:Electronics: Radar, speedometer, anemometer, plotter/chart plotter, autopilot, compass, GPS, VHF DSC radio, radar detector, TV, DVD player, radio, CD player, cockpit loudspeakers Electrical: Dock socket, generator (Fischer Panda 4000), new inverter and battery charger, new gel batteries Deck and Rigging: Steering wheel, electric winches, self-tacking jib system with spinnaker pole, hydraulic winch Sails: Fully battened mainsail, furling genoa, asymmetric spinnaker Interior: Air conditioning, heating system, hot water heater, marine refrigerator and freezer, battery charger Accommodation: 3 cabins with double berths and one cabin with a single berth for the skipper,Convertible saloon Other features: Teak cockpit,cockpit cushions, washdown shower, bathing ladder Capacities:Fuel: 300 litres Fresh water: 650 litres Waste water: 60 litres Cruising speed: Approximately 9 knots The boat’s layout and equipment are designed for comfortable cruising, suitable for a family or a reasonably sized group given she can accommodate up to 12 people. The overall condition is good — the boat has been thoroughly maintained and regularly serviced over the years. The owner’s careful approach, including limited sailing months per year and ongoing upgrades such as the new gel batteries and electrical equipment, contribute positively to her reliability.In summary, the Hanse 495 for sale 2012 presents a balanced option for anyone looking for a capable yacht in this size and price range. She is practical, reasonably spacious, and ready for medium to long-distance cruising with a proven engine and new electrical components. Don't hesitate to contact us or to schedule your viewing!
descriptionHtml:
Hanse 495 for sale 2012 | 3 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

The Hanse 495 for sale 2012 is a well-maintained cruising sailboat offering both comfort and practicality. This particular 2012 model is currently located in Île de Léros, Greece, and is in good condition, having been carefully looked after by her owner.

This Hanse 49.5 has been used for about three to five months of navigation per year, showing a reasonable amount of sailing experience without excessive wear. The inverter and battery charger are both new, as are the gel batteries, ensuring reliable power management onboard.

Specifications:

Make: Hanse
Model: 495
Year: 2012
Length Overall: 14.85 metres
Flag: Canadian
Engine: Volvo D2-75, 54 hp diesel, approximately 4,000 hours
Equipment and Features:

Electronics: Radar, speedometer, anemometer, plotter/chart plotter, autopilot, compass, GPS, VHF DSC radio, radar detector, TV, DVD player, radio, CD player, cockpit loudspeakers
Electrical: Dock socket, generator (Fischer Panda 4000), new inverter and battery charger, new gel batteries
Deck and Rigging: Steering wheel, electric winches, self-tacking jib system with spinnaker pole, hydraulic winch
Sails: Fully battened mainsail, furling genoa, asymmetric spinnaker
Interior: Air conditioning, heating system, hot water heater, marine refrigerator and freezer, battery charger
Accommodation: 3 cabins with double berths and one cabin with a single berth for the skipper,Convertible saloon
Other features: Teak cockpit,cockpit cushions, washdown shower, bathing ladder
Capacities:

Fuel: 300 litres
Fresh water: 650 litres
Waste water: 60 litres
Cruising speed: Approximately 9 knots
The boat’s layout and equipment are designed for comfortable cruising, suitable for a family or a reasonably sized group given she can accommodate up to 12 people. The overall condition is good — the boat has been thoroughly maintained and regularly serviced over the years. The owner’s careful approach, including limited sailing months per year and ongoing upgrades such as the new gel batteries and electrical equipment, contribute positively to her reliability.

In summary, the Hanse 495 for sale 2012 presents a balanced option for anyone looking for a capable yacht in this size and price range. She is practical, reasonably spacious, and ready for medium to long-distance cruising with a proven engine and new electrical components. Don't hesitate to contact us or to schedule your viewing!
